subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: The capital of Rajasthan is Jaipur.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the famous dance form of Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान के प्रमोट का नाम क्या है?
explanation_en: Gitthi is a popular folk dance form from Rajasthan. Bhangra and Garba are dances of Punjab and Gujarat respectively, while Ghoomar is a dance form of Uttar Pradesh.
explanation_hi: राजस्थान के फॉलों का नाम क्या है?
